content:
Hi, I just joined the game recently and I could use some help with team building. I’ve already watched Flares’ videos on YouTube and checked out the various guides on Discord, but I figure it doesn’t hurt to ask for some extra help. Attached to this post are all the characters I have, as well as all the wheels I have.
I’ve already started putting together a few teams: mt1.AAYXEzwGXwAwPCIAAAM8AwAAGDx_WAAALzwbXQAWPCkAAAY8N14AKjwAAAAEIzw-AAAgPDoAADI8NAAAETw2AAAACDwoUwAZPCQAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA1LjwEVgA5PIWEAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAATx9WwAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA (just need to import it on https://skeydb.com/builder)
If you have any advice or suggestions, I’d love to hear them.
Thank you in advance.

I highly discourage you from using Flares' guides. Leaving aside his abrasive personality or the fact that he has been banned in this server for brigading and harassment, quite a few of his takes and advice are either old, a meme or heavily leans towards his playstyle.

As a new player, I would suggest reading Cheri's guide instead if you haven't done so already.

 As for teams, if you grab today Vortice you can make the much better Vortice/Tawil/Hameln/flex (Murphy, Celeste). Assuming this is for dtide, you do not need to aim for 425 in the first place, much less so as a new player. 400 is where the rewards for dtide end, and depending on what resources you want, you can even stop pushing in intervals of 25. This means that you don't have to focus on making more than 5 teams, and one of them should be made with a borrowed whale dps that will carry the rest of the team.

Another thing, lemurians is a team that requires deep investment across the board for it to feel good, due to its survivability relying heavily on shielding from tentacles and GMurphy's arc2 talent. With deep investment I'm talking as high of a level as possible for everybody, high dupes and high arc2 talent levels across the board. Also, Goliath is a mainstay, you pick between Faros and Tulu as the 4th slot.

I don't know enough about Sorel to recommend teams for her beyond knowing that Saya and Pickman work really really well for her. Same deal with Gelot. What I can say though, is that a potential borrowed team with what's left could be Ryker/Helot/Faint/borrowed Mouchette.

I believe Castor/Jenkin/Horla/flex could work. You could also go the counter team route with Caecus/Winkle/Horla/Castor, although in this scenario you would want to grab a copy of Arachne.

Overall, with your current roster I would seriously consider pulling Vortice.

Yeah i think ill test some whales and figure it out from there
i managed to pull vortice so i think ill hold them for now since i now have one more dps for another team

Still have 72 Ethereal cores and everything else so I have more than enough. I also just cleared arc 1 chapter 4 with tulu, murphy, goliath, and sanga. Judging from the current awakeners that I have, which characters should I save for next? 

I'm only familiar with Aequor mechanic for now, so idk what ultra, caro or chaos teams I could make as well. Pls give me suggestions T^T
Ok thank you, i'm gonna try pulling on Vortice and Arachne then
Is her wheel good ? Cause i got it e1
Vortice's prio is getting Vortice to e1 > getting her wheel to e3 > getting Vortice to e3
Vortice e0 works perfectly fine, although you'll eventually want to e1 her (just use a dupe from the shop since the echo banner is not great for dupes)
